title: Camila Parker / Camilaparkedhere
about: Camila Parker or Camilaparkedhere is an AI-generated OnlyFans model and Instagram influencer known for cosplaying as a health teacher in Texas. In February 2026, an image of Parker standing at a podium and giving a speech went viral on sites including X / Twitter and Instagram, which some mistook as a photo of a real teacher. The image inspired memes about attractive teachers and some discourse about proper dress code for teachers. Along with her camilaparkedhere Instagram account, Parker also posts to the Instagram accounts cami.jello, camila1parker and camilaaparkerrr.
